description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mono:latest Docker image and a global before_script that runs `nuget restore -NonInteractive` for all jobs. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a `debug` job that executes `msbuild /m Altar.NET.sln /p:Configuration=Debug`. In the deploy stage add a `release` job that runs `msbuild /m Altar.NET.sln /p:Configuration=Release`, then copies the built `altar.exe`, `altar.pdb`, and the decompile-data scripts with `cp -v bin/Release/altar.exe ./altar.exe`, `cp -vf Altar.NET/bin/Release/altar.pdb ./altar.pdb`, and `cp -v utils/decompile-data.bat utils/decompile-data.ps1 utils/decompile-data.sh ./`, publishes altar.exe, decompile-data.bat, decompile-data.ps1, decompile-data.sh, README.md, LICENSE.md, and LICENSE-libaltar as artifacts, and runs only on the master branch.
